name: ts2pant
description: Translate TypeScript functions into checkable Pantagruel specifications

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && dune build wasm/ && rm -rf tools/ts2pant/src/wasm && mkdir -p tools/ts2pant/src/wasm && cp _build/default/wasm/pant_wasm.bc.wasm.js tools/ts2pant/src/wasm/ && cp -r _build/default/wasm/pant_wasm.bc.wasm.assets tools/ts2pant/src/wasm/
